title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
